briefdescription.para: Show a GUI control in the given window.
Show a list of GUI controls in the given window.
Hide a GUI control in the given window.
Hide a list of GUI controls in the given window.
Enable a GUI control in the given window.
Enable a list of GUI controls in the given window.
Disable a GUI control in the given window.
Disable a list of GUI controls in the given window.
Set the title of a list of controls.
Set the title of a control.
Set the procedure of a list of controls.
Set the procedure of a control.
Return the title of a control.

parameterdescription.para: supress assertion that ctrl must have a title

simplesect.para: Returns the title or an empty string

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string controlList, variable R, variable G, variable B)
memberdef.name: SetControlTitleColors

briefdescription.para: Change color of the title of mulitple controls.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string controlName, variable R, variable G, variable B)
memberdef.name: SetControlTitleColor

briefdescription.para: Change color of a control.

xrefdescription.para: store color in control user data, check for color change before applying change

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string controlName, variable R, variable G, variable B)
memberdef.name: ChangeControlColor

briefdescription.para: Change color of a control.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string controlName, variable R, variable G, variable B)
memberdef.name: ChangeControlValueColor

briefdescription.para: Change the font color of a control.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string controlList, variable R, variable G, variable B)
memberdef.name: ChangeControlValueColors

briefdescription.para: Change the font color of a list of controls.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string controlName, variable R, variable G, variable B, variable Alpha=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SetControlBckgColor

briefdescription.para: Changes the background color of a control.

parameterdescription.para: defaults to opaque if not provided

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string controlList, variable R, variable G, variable B)
memberdef.name: ChangeControlBckgColors

briefdescription.para: Change the background color of a list of controls.
Returns one if the checkbox is selected or zero if it is unselected.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string Control, variable newValue, variable respectLimits=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SetSetVariable

briefdescription.para: Set the internal number in a setvariable control.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string control, string str, variable setHelp=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SetSetVariableString

briefdescription.para: Set the SetVariable contents as string.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to false] set the help string as well. Allows to work around long text in small controls.

briefdescription.para: Set the state of the checkbox.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string Control, variable low, variable high, variable increment)
memberdef.name: SetSetVariableLimits

briefdescription.para: Set the input limits for a setVariable control.
Returns the contents of a SetVariable.
Returns the contents of a SetVariable with an internal string.
Returns the current PopupMenu item as string.
Returns the zero-based index of a PopupMenu.
Sets the zero-based index of the PopupMenu.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string control, string list=defaultValue, string func=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SetPopupMenuVal

briefdescription.para: Sets the popupmenu value.
Sets the popupmenu string.

parameterdescription.para: popupmenu string to select. Supports wildcard character(*)

briefdescription.para: Returns the contents of a ValDisplay.
Returns the contents of a ValDisplay as a number.
Returns the slider position.
Sets the slider position.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string control, variable var=defaultValue, string str=defaultValue, string format=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SetValDisplay

briefdescription.para: Set a ValDisplay.

detaileddescription.para:
win
panel
control
GUI control
var
numeric variable to set
format
format string referencing the numeric variable var
str
path to global variable or wave element
The following parameter combinations are valid:
var
var and format
str

briefdescription.para: Check if a given control exists.
Return the full subwindow path to the windows the control belongs to.
Return the full subwindow path to the given notebook.
Returns the number of the current tab.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string control, string key, string value)
memberdef.name: SetControlUserData

briefdescription.para: Set value as the user data named key.
Get distinctive trace colors for a given index.

detaileddescription.para: Holds 21 different trace colors, code originally from http://www.igorexchange.com/node/6532 but completely rewritten and bug-fixed.
The colors are "Twenty two colors of maximum contrast" by L. Kelly, see http://www.iscc.org/pdf/PC54_1724_001.pdf, where the color white has been removed.

briefdescription.para: Query the axis minimum and maximum values.

detaileddescription.para: For none existing graph or axis NaN is returned for minimum and high.
The return value for autoscale axis depends on the mode flag: AXIS_RANGE_INC_AUTOSCALED -> [0, 0] AXIS_RANGE_DEFAULT -> [NaN, NaN]

parameterdescription.para: [optional:default AXIS_RANGE_DEFAULT] optional mode option, see AxisRangeModeConstants

simplesect.para: minimum and maximum value of the axis range

briefdescription.para: Return the orientation of the axis as numeric value.

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph=defaultValue, string axesRegexp=defaultValue, variable orientation=defaultValue, variable mode=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: GetAxesRanges

briefdescription.para: Returns a wave with the minimum and maximum values of each axis.

detaileddescription.para:
Use SetAxesRanges to set the minimum and maximum values
GetAxisRange
graph
Name of graph
axesRegexp
[optional: default not set] filter axes names list by this optional regular expression
orientation
[optional: default not set] filter orientation of axes see AxisOrientationConstants
mode
[optional: default AXIS_RANGE_DEFAULT] filter returned axis information by mode see AxisRangeModeConstants
free wave with rows = axes, cols = axes info, dimlabel of rows is axis name

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, wave ranges=defaultValue, string axesRegexp=defaultValue, variable orientation=defaultValue, variable mode=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: SetAxesRanges

briefdescription.para: Set the range of all axes as stored by GetAxesRange.

detaileddescription.para:
Includes a heuristic if the name of the axis changed after GetAxesRange. The axis range is also restored if its index in the sorted axis list and its orientation is the same.
GetAxisRange
graph
Name of graph
ranges
wave with graph ranges as set in GetAxesRanges
axesRegexp
[optional: default not set] filter axes names list by this optional regular expression
orientation
[optional: default not set] filter orientation of axes see AxisOrientationConstants
mode
[optional: default 0] axis set mode see AxisRangeModeConstants

briefdescription.para: Returns the next axis name in a row of consecutive and already existing axis names.
Return a unique axis name.
Generic wrapper for setting a control's value pass in the value as a string, and then decide whether to change to a number based on the type of control.
Generic wrapper for getting a control's value.
Generic wrapper for getting a controls state (enabled, hidden, disabled)
Generic wrapper for setting a controls state (enabled, hidden, disabled)
Return one if the given control is disabled, zero otherwise.
Return one if the given control is hidden, zero otherwise.
Return the main window name from a full subwindow specification.

parameterdescription.para: window name including subwindows, e.g. panel#subWin1#subWin2

briefdescription.para: Return the currently active window.
Return 1 if there are cursors on the graph, 0 if not.
Return a 1D text wave with all infos about the cursors.

detaileddescription.para: Returns an invalid wave reference when no cursors are present. Counterpart to RestoreCursors().
The data is sorted like CURSOR_NAMES.

briefdescription.para: Restore the cursors from the info of GetCursorInfos().
Autoscale all vertical axes in the visible x range.
Return the type of the variable of the SetVariable control.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string control, variable *minVal, variable *maxVal, variable *incVal)
memberdef.name: ExtractLimits

briefdescription.para: Extract the limits specification of the control and return it in minVal, maxVal and incVal

simplesect.para: 0 on success, 1 if no specification could be found
ExtractLimitsFromRecMacro for a faster way if you already have the recreation macro

briefdescription.para: Check if the given value is inside the limits defined by the control.

simplesect.para:
- 0: outside limits
1: inside limits, i.e. val lies in the range [min, max]
NaN: no limits could be found

briefdescription.para: Returns a value that is constrained by the limits defined by the control.

simplesect.para: val <= control max and val >= contorl min

briefdescription.para: Return the parameter type a function parameter.
Return an entry from the given recreation macro.

detaileddescription.para: The recreation macro of a single GUI control looks like: embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * PopupMenu popup_ctrl,pos={1.00,1.00},size={55.00,19.00},proc=PGCT_PopMenuProc * PopupMenu popup_ctrl,mode=1,popvalue="Entry1",value= #"\"Entry1;Entry2;Entry3\"" *
This function allows to extract key/value pairs from it.

parameterdescription.para: non-empty string (must be followed by = in the recreation macro)
GUI control recreation macro as returned by ControlInfo

briefdescription.para: Search for invalid control procedures in the given panel or graph.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default to false] print out controls which don't have a control procedure but can have one.

simplesect.para: 1 on error, 0 if everything is fine.

briefdescription.para: Convert the function subType names for GUI control procedures to a numeric value as used by ControlInfo
Return the numeric control type.
Determines if control stores numeric or text data.
Returns checkbox mode.
Returns the selected row of the ListBox for some modes without selection waves.
Check if the location loc is inside the rectangle r
Return the coordinates of the control borders relative to the top left corner in pixels.
Get the text (plain or formatted) from the notebook.
Replace the contents of the notebook.
Append to a notebook.
Select the end in the given notebook.

detaileddescription.para: The selection is the place where the user would naïvely enter new text.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves named userdata keys from a recreation macro string.

simplesect.para: Textwave with all unqiue entries or $"" if nothing could be found.

briefdescription.para: Converts an Igor control type number to control name.
Converts an Igor control name to control type number.

Checks if a certain window can act as valid host for subwindows developer note: The only integrated Igor function that does this is ChildWindowList. Though, ChildWindowList generates an RTE for non-valid windows, where this check function does not.

parameterdescription.para: window name that should be checked to be a valid host for subwindows

simplesect.para: 1 if window is a valid host, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Recursively build a list of windows, including all child windows, starting with wName.

parameterdescription.para: parent window name to start with

simplesect.para: A string containing names of windows. This list is a semicolon separated list. It will include the window wName and all of its children and children of children, etc.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a window is tagged as certain type.

simplesect.para: panelTags returns 1 if window is a DA_Ephys panel

briefdescription.para: Show a contextual popup menu which allows the user to change the set variable limit's increment.

listitem.para: Expects the ctrl to have the named user data "DefaultIncrement"
Works only on right mouse click on the title or the value field, not the up/down arrow buttons

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, variable x0, variable y0, variable x1, variable y1, string unit=defaultValue, variable drawLength=defaultValue, variable labelOffset=defaultValue, variable newlineBeforeUnit=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: DrawScaleBar

briefdescription.para: Draw a scale bar on a graph.

parameterdescription.para: [optional] data unit when drawing the label
[optional, defaults to false] true/false for outputting the label
[optional] offset in current coordinates of the label
[optional] Use a newline before the unit instead of a space

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, WaveText w, variable h, variable s)
memberdef.name: AccelerateHideTraces

briefdescription.para: Accelerated setting of multiple traces in a graph to un/hidden.

parameterdescription.para: number of traces in text wave

memberdef.argsstring: (string graph, WaveText w, variable h, variable l)
memberdef.name: AccelerateModLineSizeTraces

briefdescription.para: Accelerated setting of line size of multiple traces in a graph.

parameterdescription.para: number of traces in text wave

briefdescription.para: Return the value and type of the popupmenu list.

parameterdescription.para: extracted string with the contents of value from the recreation macro
popup menu list type, one of PopupMenuListTypes

briefdescription.para: Return the popupmenu list entries.

parameterdescription.para: String with a list or function (what you enter with PopupMenu value=#XXX)

briefdescription.para: Return the recreation macro and the type of the given control.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string control, string setting, variable defValue=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: GetControlSettingVar

briefdescription.para: Query a numeric GUI control property.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string control, string setting, string defValue=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: GetControlSettingStr

briefdescription.para: Query a string GUI control property.
Check and disable dependent controls.

detaileddescription.para: Enables a list of checkbox controls and stores their current values as user data before disabling them. On switching back their previous values are restored and they are also enabled again.

briefdescription.para: Adjust the "Normal" ruler in the notebook so that all text is visible.
Helper functions related to GUI controls.
